title: 3D GUI Swords
description: Swords are 3D when held and in perspective while maintaining the vanilla 2D sprite in GUI.
body:
# Description
3D Swords makes all swords have a 3D model, but when viewed in GUI or an item frame/shelf, it has the vanilla model.

## Credits
This one online post when I was tryna figure out how to have a different GUI model that said to look into the spyglass model
